Package org.eventb.internal.core.sc.modules

org.eventb.internal.core.tool.Module

org.eventb.internal.core.sc.modules.LabeledElementModule

    • initModule

      public void initModule(IRodinElement element, ISCStateRepository repository, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Description copied from class: SCProcessorModule
      Default implementation of initModule() does nothing.
      Specified by:
      initModule in interface ISCProcessorModule
      Overrides:
      initModule in class LabeledElementModule
      Parameters:
      element - the input "unchecked" element
      repository - the state repository to use
      monitor - a progress monitor
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if there was a problem initialising this module
      See Also:
      • IProcessorModule

      Default implementation of initModule() does nothing.
      Specified by:
      endModule in interface ISCProcessorModule
      Overrides:
      endModule in class LabeledElementModule
      Parameters:
      element - the input "unchecked" element
      repository - the state repository to use
      monitor - a progress monitor

      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if there was a problem terminating this module

    • parseFormula

      protected abstract F parseFormula(I formulaElement, Collection<FreeIdentifier> freeIdentifierContext, FormulaFactory factory) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Parameters:
      formulaElement - the formula element
      freeIdentifierContext - the free identifier context of this predicate (@see org.eventb.core.ast.Formula#isLegible(Collection))
      factory - the formula factory to use
      Returns:
      parsed formula, iff the formula was successfully parsed, null otherwise
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if there was a problem accessing the database or the symbol table

    • typeCheckFormula

      protected ITypeEnvironment typeCheckFormula(I formulaElement, F formula, ITypeEnvironment environment) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Parameters:
      formulaElement - the formula element
      formula - the parsed formula
      Returns:
      the inferred type environment
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if there was a problem accessing the database or the symbol table
